text.message: I think I'm behind this game
blue gets wheat port and it's OP
you have 8 cards I can't take 1 for 1
i might even solo u for asking
put that big dog back on the 5
green can I have a brick to plow blue
knew I shoulda gone the other way
dont u want me holdin road haere
guess we have to wait til u take army
i was 1 wheat away from getting road
